source: Stored-data cleanup backlog and cleanup-workflow-policy shared common prototype distilled into a shared-ownership readiness manifest
description: Pins the stored-data cleanup behavior families that must remain covered before cleanup traversal and filtering delegate to shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Stored-data cleanup shared ownership remains valid while cleanup-workflow-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS facade tests continue to reference the same vectors, cleanup list-failure and empty-parent remove-path splits are preserved in adapters or reconciled explicitly, public facade error mapping is pinned, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production shared ownership.

notes: This readiness manifest is a shared ownership gate for cleanup traversal and filtering behavior-family completeness only; low-level file transport, public facade error mapping, platform split compatibility, and compile verification remain required before production stored-data cleanup code moves to shared.
